narrative_summary: - User invoked the `dagster-expert` skill with a request to configure automation for the `customer_summary` asset: trigger on updates from any upstream except `zip_codes`, which only needs to have run since the start of the month
- Skill loaded, providing reference index for Dagster patterns
- Read three reference files to understand the relevant automation APIs:
- `declarative-automation/core-concepts.md` - full expanded form of `eager()` and other built-ins
- Searched for `customer_summary` in the project and found it at `src/acme_co_dataeng/defs/customer_summary.py`
- Read the file: simple asset with three deps (`customer_events`, `sales_data`, `zip_codes`), no automation condition set
- Applied the edit using the `Edit` tool:

- Added `_zip_codes_updated_this_month` condition using `any_deps_match(newly_updated().since(cron_tick_passed("0 0 1 * *"))).allow(AssetSelection.assets("zip_codes"))` — checks that `zip_codes` has been materialized more recently than the last first-of-month cron tick
- Explained the resulting behavior to the user and reminded them to enable the `default_automation_condition_sensor` in the UI
